reflection:
morning marko. 5:05 wake again, but this time it wasn't anxiety, it was your body running hot. skin warm on the surface, gases, ruporut on board. you logged feverish_am at 5, which is the highest of the week. and yet you didn't spiral. mood sat at 7 all day, anxiety at 1, pain dropped to 3 from monday's 5. something is actually calming in your system, even as the surface noise stays loud.

but here's what you wrote in your morning journal and then walked right past. 'i haven't started writing yet for my speech and that's definitely what i've been avoiding.' you named it. then the day filled itself with massage with kaya, the artful dodger, ENT, packing, duolingo. all real, none of them the speech. avoidance dresses up nicely when there are enough soft tasks to fill the hours.

the dizziness worry is fair and the borrelia test idea is reasonable. but chasing the dizziness is not a reason to dodge the speech. it's the reason to write it now, while your head is clearer than it's been in weeks and you have a quiet day before the UK eats your time.

one thing for today. 20 minutes on the speech opener. doesn't have to be good. just down on paper. the rest can wait.
opener: you named the speech as avoidance. today's the day to put 20 min on paper
focus_for_today: 20 min on the speech opener, before the UK trip eats your hours
